title: EB and CC have update - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will be displayed
scenario: DFU popup incorrectly prompts Lens Desktop requirement for Charge Case update after successful Earbuds firmware update
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a device that has firmware updates available for both the Charge Case (CC) and Earbuds (EB).
3. Observe the firmware update prompt(s) on the Home screen.
4. Trigger the Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Earbuds.
6. Return to the device Home screen.
7. Observe the popup displayed on the Home screen.
expected: After completing the Earbuds DFU and returning to the Home screen, a popup is displayed informing the user that Lens Desktop is needed to update the Charge Case.
